name: deduce
description: VS Code integration for the Deduce proof checker and educational programming language.

commands.title: Deduce: Eliminate / use hypothesis at cursor
Deduce: Fill hole with matching given

deduce.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter used to run both the Deduce language server (lsp/lsp_server.py) and the debug adapter (lsp/dap_server.py).  The interpreter must have lark and pygls installed.  Absolute paths are supported; otherwise the binary is looked up on $PATH.

deduce.deduceRoot.description: Absolute path to your Deduce *installation* (the directory containing lsp/lsp_server.py and lsp/dap_server.py), NOT to your proofs directory.  When empty (the default) the extension uses the open workspace folder; set this only when your workspace is your proofs directory and the Deduce checkout lives elsewhere.

deduce.noStdlib.description: If true, start the language server without the standard library prelude (sets DEDUCE_NO_STDLIB=1 in the spawned environment, mirroring 'deduce.py --no-stdlib').  Useful when working on lib/ itself or on minimal test fixtures.

deduce.fillHole.backend.description: Backend used by the 'Deduce: Fill hole with LLM' command (Ctrl+Alt+A).  'anthropic' uses Anthropic's SDK and reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY by default; 'openai-compat' uses the OpenAI SDK against the OpenAI API (or any compatible endpoint via deduce.fillHole.baseUrl) and reads OPENAI_API_KEY by default.

deduce.fillHole.model.description: Model ID passed to the hole-fill sidecar.  Leave empty to pick a sensible default per backend ('claude-opus-4-7' for anthropic, 'gemma-4-31B-it' for openai-compat).

deduce.fillHole.apiKeyEnv.description: Name of the environment variable holding the API key.  Leave empty to pick the backend default (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY).  Useful when routing through a gateway like REALLMS_API_KEY.

deduce.fillHole.baseUrl.description: Override the OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL (e.g. https://reallms.rescloud.iu.edu/direct/v1 for IU's REALLMs gateway, or a local Ollama at http://localhost:11434/v1).  Empty means use the SDK's default (the real OpenAI API).  Ignored when backend is 'anthropic'.

deduce.fillHole.maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of validate-proof attempts the sidecar makes.  The first proof that passes 'deduce/validateProof' wins; the sidecar exits with the failure trace if none of the attempts validate.

deduce.fillHole.timeout.description: Per-validate-call timeout in seconds passed to the sidecar.  Applies to each attempt's proof-check, not to the total time of the fill-hole session.

program.description: Path to the .pf file to debug.

cwd.description: Working directory for the adapter (usually your Deduce checkout so 'python3 -m lsp.dap_server' resolves).

configurationSnippets.label: Deduce: Launch current file
configurationSnippets.description: Launch the active .pf file under the Deduce debugger.
